title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-03
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just watered the plants and updated the daily metrics for all community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse rankings.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot watering pixelated code-plants in a greenhouse, with the bee mascot holding a clipboard checking off a list.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard.
